name: IDEXX Cornerstone Veterinary Practice API
what_it_does: IDEXX Cornerstone REST API for veterinary practice management system (PIMS). Enables AI agents to manage patient (animal) medical records and appointment scheduling, process treatment plans and medical notes, integrate with IDEXX diagnostic laboratory results, manage pharmacy dispensing and prescription records, access client billing and invoicing data, handle inventory management, retrieve practice analytics and reporting, and connect veterinary data with diagnostic imaging and specialist referral systems.
use_cases: Accessing patient medical records and appointment data from veterinary operations agents
Integrating diagnostic lab results from IDEXX laboratory agents
Managing pharmacy dispensing and controlled substance records from medication management agents
Retrieving practice revenue analytics from veterinary business intelligence agents
not_for: Large animal or production livestock without companion animal and equine focus
Animal research facilities without clinical practice management
best_when: A veterinary clinic, animal hospital, or specialty practice using IDEXX Cornerstone wants AI agents to automate appointment scheduling, medical record updates, lab result integration, and billing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Client and patient data includes personal and financial information. Controlled substance dispensing records require DEA compliance. IDEXX lab integration involves proprietary diagnostic data agreements.

auth.notes: IDEXX Cornerstone uses API key authentication. Practice-level credentials. Integration via IDEXX partner program. No granular scope control. Limited public API documentation. Primary integration via VetConnect Plus and IDEXX Neo interoperability.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — veterinary practice management enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-practice monthly pricing; IDEXX bundle pricing includes lab and software
pricing.notes: Westbrook, Maine. NYSE: IDXX. Founded 1983. Dominant veterinary diagnostics company. Cornerstone is their flagship on-premises PIMS. 30,000+ practices. IDEXX also offers cloud-based Neo. Competes with ezyVet, Covetrus Pulse, and AVImark. Lab integration is core competitive advantage.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact IDEXX partner program

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Veterinary client and patient data includes PII and controlled substance records
No public MCP server — API key with IDEXX partner program
No webhooks — polling required for lab result and appointment updates
On-premises software — API endpoint is local network; cloud access requires VPN or IDEXX cloud connector
IDEXX lab integration via separate VetConnect Plus API — dual integration required
DEA controlled substance dispensing records require strict compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary client and patient data. PCI-DSS, DEA CSOS. API key only. US data residency. On-premises deployment common. Controlled substance compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary PII and controlled substance records. PCI-DSS, DEA CSOS. API key only. US data residency. On-premises with local API endpoint.
